schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: "Laptop Supply Scheme" by the School Education Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh provides ₹25,000/- for purchasing a laptop to students who score 80% or more in 12th Standard from a Government Higher Secondary School or a Madhya Pradesh Board (MP Board) affiliated school.
schemeContent.benefits_md: An amount of ₹25,000/- is provided for purchasing a laptop.
schemeContent.briefDescription: "Laptop Supply Scheme" by the School Education Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh provides ₹25,000/- for purchasing a laptop to students who score 80% or more in 12th Standard from a Government Higher Secondary School or a Madhya Pradesh Board (MP Board) affiliated school.

children.text: "Laptop Supply Scheme" by the School Education Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh provides ₹25,000/- for purchasing a laptop to students who score 80% or more in 12th Standard from a Government Higher Secondary School or a Madhya Pradesh Board (MP Board) affiliated school.
An amount of ₹25,000/- is provided for purchasing a laptop.
The entire proceedings are prepared by the class teacher of the school and sent to the district education officer’s office.

applicationProcess.process_md: The entire proceedings are prepared by the class teacher of the school and sent to the district education officer’s office.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md:
1. The applicant should be a student.
   1. The applicant should be a permanent resident of Madhya Pradesh.
   1. The applicant should have passed the 12th Standard with 80% or above marks.

children.text: The applicant should be a student.
The applicant should be a permanent resident of Madhya Pradesh.
The applicant should have passed the 12th Standard with 80% or above marks.
